title: UniBond 2643638 Ultra Force Wall Tile Adhesive and Grout in Easy Apply Tube, 2 in 1 Waterproof Wall Tile Adhesive with Grout for Easy Tiling, White 300g
features: Ultra Force technology - This white tile adhesive is suitable for use in every room and has been made with our Ultra Force technology to ensure long-lasting results
Triple Protect - The white tile glue and grout has integrated technology that repels and protects against mould formation to keep results looking fresh and professional
High grab - The strong formula of the tile glue is non-slip and ensures high adhesion of wall tiles, suitable for use on a range of surfaces and in various room types
Multiple tile types - The quick grout is easy to apply and works with ceramic, porcelain and mosaic tiles to create professional results. The grout will cure in 24 hours
Package contents - Unibond Ultra Force Wall Tile Adhesive and Grout, 2 in 1 water-resistant, high grab, non slip tile adhesive with grout in easy apply tube. Ready to apply. White. 300g
description: From the manufacturer About UniBond In the UK, UniBond offers a wide range of DIY products - Construction Adhesives, Sealants and Tile Adhesives. By offering guidance and smart total bonding solutions, it simplifies every kind of DIY job for both inside and outside the house. UniBond Ultra Force Wall Tile Grout High strength fibre-enforced technology UniBond Ultra Force contains fibre technology for ultimate durability. This wall tile grout is a quick and ready-to-use water-resistant grout for interior ceramic, porcelain and mosaic wall tiles. The triple protection system repels and prevents mould. The revolutionary slow-release anti-mould fungicide lasts more than 50% longer than standard fungicides. Triple protection against mould Fibre enforced strength Cures in 24 hours Reduced shrinkage Water-resistant Colour: White 1 x 300g tube Flawless tiling and grouting in 4 simple steps Apply and fix tiles Step 1: Apply adhesive to the wall, not to the tile directly. Use horizontal beads at 15-20mm intervals. Step 2: Fix tiles immediately. Bed tiles firmly with a twisting action. Use tile spacers to ensure regular spacing. Grout Step 3: Press grout firmly into joints, ensuring they are full. Smooth the joint using a grouting tool (sold separately) and remove excess grout immediately with a damp cloth. Finishing touches! Step 4: Allow the grout to dry for 24 hours then polish with a clean cloth. To maintain mould-free grout, wash regularly with a fungicidal cleaner. Apply straight from the tube - no mixing required Water-resistant and compatible with multiple tile types The quick grout is easy to apply and works with ceramic, porcelain and mosaic tiles to create professional results. Thanks to its water-resistant nature the high-quality product has universal applicability and is suitable as both a kitchen grout and a bathroom grout.
